## Summary


## Test plan

- [ ] Relevant local checks were run, or the reason they were skipped is stated.

## Codex Cloud

- [ ] For high-risk or non-trivial changes, request review with `@codex review`.

Suggested comprehensive prompt:

```text
@codex review comprehensively. Focus on correctness, tests, security/privacy,
tenant scoping, migration safety, and deployability. Cite files and lines for
every finding.
```
